title: Promepla
description: Promepla is a Contract Design Manufacturer specializing in single-use plastic medical components and devices. They offer a comprehensive range of services including product design and development, prototyping, testing, quality assurance, cleanroom manufacturing, and sterilization. Their expertise caters to various sectors within the healthcare industry, providing customized solutions for medical device manufacturers. Promepla's commitment to quality is underscored by their ISO 13485 certification, ensuring rigorous control over every aspect of design and production.
